name: Ted Cruz
subject: This is huge!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Friend, this is huge. A group of generous donors have just agreed to match all online donations -- dollar for dollar -- made in the next TEN days. |
---
| | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32097412:WxgWjIyuN:m:1:1104269936:2E48536E1080FBDE129C897F9E45DF6E:r) |
---|---|---
---
| Friend,

This is huge.

A group of generous donors have just agreed to **match all online donations -- dollar for dollar --** made in the next TEN days.

That's right: [**your donation of $25 is now worth $50, your donation of $50 instantly doubles to $100, or your donation of $1000 now becomes worth $2000!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32097412:WxgWjIyuN:m:1:1104269936:2E48536E1080FBDE129C897F9E45DF6E:r)

This incredible opportunity for you and me is **only good for the next TEN days,** and it only applies to online donations.

I have included (below) the special, secure donations links you must use to take advantage of this TREMENDOUS opportunity.

[** INSTANT DONATE $25 -> $50 AFTER MATCH » **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32097413:WxgWjIyuN:m:1:1104269936:2E48536E1080FBDE129C897F9E45DF6E:r)

[** INSTANT DONATE $50 -> $100 AFTER MATCH » **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32097414:WxgWjIyuN:m:1:1104269936:2E48536E1080FBDE129C897F9E45DF6E:r)

[** INSTANT DONATE $250 -> $500 AFTER MATCH » **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32097415:WxgWjIyuN:m:1:1104269936:2E48536E1080FBDE129C897F9E45DF6E:r)

[** INSTANT DONATE $1000 -> $2000 AFTER MATCH » **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32097416:WxgWjIyuN:m:1:1104269936:2E48536E1080FBDE129C897F9E45DF6E:r)

[** INSTANTLY DOUBLE YOUR OWN AMOUNT » **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32097417:WxgWjIyuN:m:1:1104269936:2E48536E1080FBDE129C897F9E45DF6E:r)

It's hard for me to explain to you just how important this Instant Match program is for our campaign.

_**You see, the Washington Cartel largely controls who gets the 'big dollar' campaign money in America.**_

And as you well know, my conservative campaign is challenging the Washington Cartel head on -- this means _**they won't give me a cent.**_ They know the best way to slow down and eventually end my campaign is to freeze us out of their big money, special interest slush fund.

Well Friend, I don't want their money.

In fact, it's your support that I value most!

And right now, this is a chance for you to **double the impact of your donation.** That is why I'm so excited about this Instant Match program.

Please make an immediate Instant Match donation, because **every dollar you donate will go twice as far to fund my campaign** and spread my message as the only consistent conservative in the race for president.

Again -- as I said before -- this Instant Match program only applies to online donations and it is only available for the next TEN days.

So Friend, please do your part. [**Simply click here now and make the most generous gift you can afford**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32097412:WxgWjIyuN:m:1:1104269936:2E48536E1080FBDE129C897F9E45DF6E:r) _\-- and watch it double._

Thank you!

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

P.S. When making your donation today, remember, **every dollar will be instantly matched,** but only for the next ten days.

|

| | PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
www.tedcruz.org

---

name: Beth Hansen, Campaign Manager
subject: New Ad: "Ready to Lead"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)

Peter, we wanted to share with you our new ad. Released on Pearl Harbor Day, this video honors the bravery & sacrifice of America's men and women in uniform.

America's Armed Forces deserve a Commander-in-Chief ready to lead them. We can't have anymore on-the-job training in the White House. John Kasich's 18 years of national security policy experience means he has the understanding of our military and today's complex global landscape needed to hit the ground running on Day One as Commander-in-Chief.

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/32097821:WdgzNIyNO:m:1:958431888:5CF08AC109ED1EFF4990C69799EC430E:r)
[Watch the ad (here)](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/32097821:WdgzNIyNO:m:1:958431888:5CF08AC109ED1EFF4990C69799EC430E:r)
[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/32097822:WdgzNIyNO:m:1:958431888:5CF08AC109ED1EFF4990C69799EC430E:r)

We're less than 100 days away from the early primary states and will need your ongoing support to finish strong and continue our momentum all the way to victory!

[Please consider a generous contribution today to help us keep this ad going](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/32097823:WdgzNIyNO:m:1:958431888:5CF08AC109ED1EFF4990C69799EC430E:r).

Thank you for your support!

**Beth Hansen**
Campaign Manager
[JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/32097824:WdgzNIyNO:m:1:958431888:5CF08AC109ED1EFF4990C69799EC430E:r)

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/32097823:WdgzNIyNO:m:1:958431888:5CF08AC109ED1EFF4990C69799EC430E:r)
Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: 🚨🚨 Take This Survey
body:
LindseyGraham.com

Friend, take my quick survey.

Friend,

I just returned last week from my 36th trip to the Middle East
where I met with our troops and military commanders, talked with
Iraqi political and military leaders, and got an on-the-ground
assessment of our battle against ISIL. Unfortunately, I saw
first-hand how President Obama's strategy is failing and making
the world more dangerous.

Now that I've gotten an update from over there, I'd like to know
how you feel about our security here at home. Do you think our
nation is safe right now? Do you personally feel safe?

I just put together a short 5-question survey on national
security, and I'd like you to give me your input as soon as
possible.

Please click here to take my December National Security Survey.

The entire survey will only take a minute of your time. I know
we're all busy this time of year, but I'd really like to hear
your thoughts in order to have a complete picture of how my
fellow Americans view our nation's security.

Thank you so much.

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

P.S. I believe President Obama's strategy to defeat ISIL is
failing, but I'd like to hear your thoughts on the matter. Would
you please take one minute to complete my December National
Security Survey and give me your feedback? After you finish my
short survey, I hope you'll consider making a small donation to
my campaign. The donation isn't required to complete the survey,
but I really hope you'll consider investing in my campaign to
keep America safe. I am the only candidate who has a plan to
defeat ISIL and will begin implementing it on day one as
Commander in Chief.

Paid for by Lindsey
Graham 2016

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 14, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWbEJQIyPN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWbEJQIyPN

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Ken McKay
subject: Jeb Endorses Christie in NH
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
|
---
| |
---|---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45262009:JGzxXxLLN:m:1:1516426255:573083F13BC867E47C6B8BB1C8D33F9C:r) |
| | | **"The clear momentum candidate in New Hampshire is Chris Christie."** \- Public Policy Polling Peter, Lately, it's been a whirlwind for Governor Christie and this campaign. On November 28th he picked up the **endorsement from the largest newspaper in New Hampshire, the _Union Leader_**. Then, just last week, a New Hampshire poll showed him gaining ground in the state at **10% which vaulted him to the top tier of candidates**. He also holds **the best favorability among New Hampshire voters of any of the GOP candidates at 61%**. A day later, the CNN national poll **put him ahead of Jeb Bush, John Kasich, Carly Fiorina, and more**. And today, we have announced another big endorsement out of New Hampshire, **State Senator and Majority Leader, Jeb Bradley has joined the team!** Many GOP presidential candidates sought out Majority Leader Bradley's endorsement, but ultimately he has chosen to back Governor Christie.
The momentum you have helped create is on display, **but we can't stop now.** Governor Christie's widespread support is producing results, so now, more than ever, **we need your help.** Peter, **[please donate $5, $25, $50, or whatever you can to help push Governor Christie further to the top](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45262009:JGzxXxLLN:m:1:1516426255:573083F13BC867E47C6B8BB1C8D33F9C:r)**.
People all over the country are recognizing that Governor Christie is the only candidate with the experience and leadership qualities to get America through these uncertain times, but **[we need to continue spreading this message far and wide](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45262009:JGzxXxLLN:m:1:1516426255:573083F13BC867E47C6B8BB1C8D33F9C:r)**.
**[Chip in today and see the results your donation will produce for Governor Christie](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45262009:JGzxXxLLN:m:1:1516426255:573083F13BC867E47C6B8BB1C8D33F9C:r)**.
Best,
Ken McKay
Chris Christie 2016 [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45262009:JGzxXxLLN:m:1:1516426255:573083F13BC867E47C6B8BB1C8D33F9C:r)
---

name: Rand Paul
subject: Aren't we all tired of this by now?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot:
In last night's address, the President continued his failure of leadership and his outrageous quest to turn a necessary discussion on terrorism and national security into an unnecessary and ineffective gun control debate. **Aren 't we all tired of this by now?** [I think Americans can agree, we need a leader who supports the Constitution and stands for the 2nd Amendment.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32103406:sU3kYIyN5:m:1:879035888:E74E363A7F1EB119AB5894F39CE077C1:r) **Let's be clear: disarming more law abiding citizens will not stop mass murderers and terrorists.** We should be advocating for more concealed carry ability for law abiding Americans and an end to unconstitutional gun free zones. It's also important that we reform our border security, including refugee and visa programs. While the President paid lip service to this fight, he plans to keep the failed current rules in place and allow tens of thousands of refugees to enter our country. I couldn't disagree more strongly. **Immigration, visas and refugees from countries with active terror networks must have halted while we determine how to better secure our borders and our people.** Finally, we must stop doing the same foolish things overseas that the President advocated for throughout his remarks. We must stop arming and training allies of ISIS and al Qaeda. We should not double down on this failed and dangerous policy that the President called for tonight. We must arm our allies the Kurds and insist on Arab boots on the ground for our allies in the region. **There are answers here to make our nation safe, but once again the President seems incapable of finding them.** His Administration is focused on gun laws that won't stop terrorists while pushing policies that will let more of them in the country. It's 100 percent wrong and proves the need for new leadership for our country. **I will lead.** [Will you stand with me?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32103406:sU3kYIyN5:m:1:879035888:E74E363A7F1EB119AB5894F39CE077C1:r) In Liberty, Rand Paul | | [GIVE $10 TODAY >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32103407:sU3kYIyN5:m:1:879035888:E74E363A7F1EB119AB5894F39CE077C1:r)
---
[GIVE $25 TODAY >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32103408:sU3kYIyN5:m:1:879035888:E74E363A7F1EB119AB5894F39CE077C1:r)
[GIVE $50 TODAY >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32103409:sU3kYIyN5:m:1:879035888:E74E363A7F1EB119AB5894F39CE077C1:r)
[GIVE $100 TODAY >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32103410:sU3kYIyN5:m:1:879035888:E74E363A7F1EB119AB5894F39CE077C1:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32103406:sU3kYIyN5:m:1:879035888:E74E363A7F1EB119AB5894F39CE077C1:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Rand Paul
subject: They agree with Obama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot:

While President Obama is trying to use last
week's tragedy in San Bernardino to drum up support for gun
control, I'm afraid there are those in my own party who are
trying to use those shootings to further their own Big Government
agenda.

In the process, they're doing all they can to
SMEAR me.

Patriot, you know the drill.

"Give us your freedom, and we'll make you
safe" cry authoritarian politicians in BOTH parties.

Today, that's exactly what Governor Chris
Christie and Senator Marco Rubio are doing in the debate over
government spying, attacking me for standing up against the NSA's
bulk collection of Americans' phone records.

If they had been paying attention, they'd
know this program has still been up and running for the past six
months.

But NSA spying did nothing to stop the
attacks we saw in San Bernardino, just like it did nothing to
stop the Boston bombers. Likewise, the French program, which is
1,000 times more invasive than ours, did nothing to stop the
Paris attacks.

Yet, just like President Obama with gun
control, I'm afraid Chris Christie and Marco Rubio believe it's
just too good an opportunity to worry about facts.

Under their proscriptions for the country, we
should leave our borders wide open, spy on every American and
hope that stops the bad guys.

But recent history has shown finding
terrorist needles in a haystack is not only a violation of
Americans' privacy, it's also ineffective.

A brand-new report from the Senate Homeland
Security and Government Affairs Committee identified both our
southern border with Mexico and our northern border with Canada
as "significant terrorist pathways."

It seems visas are handed out like Halloween
candy to those who want to harm us.

And President Obama and Big Government
members of my own party want to keep flooding our country with
refugees when we know at least one ISIS militant abused the
program to gain entry into France and ended up launching those
horrific attacks.

The only real solution is to finally secure
our borders and get serious about vetting who we allow into this
country -- something establishment Members of BOTH parties refuse
to do.

Then, when their plans fail to defend our
nation, they say our liberty is to blame!

We don't need laws that crack down on
law-abiding Americans' right to keep and bear arms. We don't
need more spying on innocent Americans.

We need a government who will uphold our Bill
of Rights while securing our borders.

I'm running for President to stop this
madness.

If you stand with me, please agree to your
most generous gift of $50, $25 or even $10 right away.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

GIVE $10 TODAY >>

GIVE $25 TODAY >>

GIVE $50 TODAY >>

GIVE $100 TODAY >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

clean_body: Dear Patriot: While President Obama is trying to use last week's tragedy in San Bernardino to drum up support for gun control, I'm afraid there are those in my own party who are trying to use those shootings to further their own Big Government agenda. In the process, they're doing all they can to SMEAR me. Patriot, you know the drill. "Give us your freedom, and we'll make you safe" cry authoritarian politicians in BOTH parties. Today, that's exactly what Governor Chris Christie and Senator Marco Rubio are doing in the debate over government spying, attacking me for standing up against the NSA's bulk collection of Americans' phone records. If they had been paying attention, they'd know this program has still been up and running for the past six months. But NSA spying did nothing to stop the attacks we saw in San Bernardino, just like it did nothing to stop the Boston bombers. Likewise, the French program, which is 1,000 times more invasive than ours, did nothing to stop the Paris attacks. Yet, just like President Obama with gun control, I'm afraid Chris Christie and Marco Rubio believe it's just too good an opportunity to worry about facts. Under their proscriptions for the country, we should leave our borders wide open, spy on every American and hope that stops the bad guys. But recent history has shown finding terrorist needles in a haystack is not only a violation of Americans' privacy, it's also ineffective. A brand-new report from the Senate Homeland Security and Government Affairs Committee identified both our southern border with Mexico and our northern border with Canada as "significant terrorist pathways." It seems visas are handed out like Halloween candy to those who want to harm us. And President Obama and Big Government members of my own party want to keep flooding our country with refugees when we know at least one ISIS militant abused the program to gain entry into France and ended up launching those horrific attacks. The only real solution is to finally secure our borders and get serious about vetting who we allow into this country -- something establishment Members of BOTH parties refuse to do. Then, when their plans fail to defend our nation, they say our liberty is to blame! We don't need laws that crack down on law-abiding Americans' right to keep and bear arms. We don't need more spying on innocent Americans. We need a government who will uphold our Bill of Rights while securing our borders. I'm running for President to stop this madness. If you stand with me, please agree to your most generous gift of $50, $25 or even $10 right away. In Liberty, Rand Paul GIVE $10 TODAY >> GIVE $25 TODAY >> GIVE $50 TODAY >> GIVE $100 TODAY >> Or donate another amount >> Paid for by Rand Paul for President This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system April 16, 2015. For more information please follow the URL below: Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out: To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-30915140456-echo3-AED3F0D60530300940CC7E1F4CC6D0E0@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line. ----Powered by Paramount Communication----

name: Jeb Bush
subject: Have you confirmed this, Friend?
body:
Friend -- need to get the note below in front of you. Tonight's the deadline to become a Founding Field Member and I haven't seen you step up yet.

**Remember, if you engage before midnight tonight we 'll add your name to the donor walls in state headquarters. So become a Founding Field Member now: [Jeb2016.com/Founding-Field-Member/](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/rcgfyklbwvgpjsjcpkqfwphsllphbsybfktkgbsnrjgv_sksmmlpj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

We're building a massive grassroots organization, but we can't do it without you.

I look forward to having you as a member of this special team.

Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/iybkpbcqzdmwgrgywbfkzwtrccwtqrpqkbnbmqrvhgmn_sksmmlpj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
**-- Begin Forwarded Message--
From: Team Jeb
Date: December 05, 2015
Subject: New member: Jeb**
Jeb - With only 58 days until the Iowa caucuses and 66 days until the New Hampshire primary, we're kicking into high gear.

We have 14 field offices spread out across Iowa, South Carolina, New Hampshire and Nevada, but it takes significant resources to keep them running every day.

That's why we need a special group of supporters to become Founding Field Members. With the help of our Founding Field Members, we'll execute the most advanced ground game of any campaign in the country.

[**Will you chip in $100, $50, $25, or even just $5 right now and become a Founding Field Member to help Jeb 's ground game in Iowa, New Hampshire and beyond.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/amdzrylgsphnbcbmnywzsnvcllnvgcrgzytyhgcdkbhs_sksmmlpj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

If you chip in in the next 48 hours, here's what you'll get in return:
* We'll add your name to the donor wall in our field offices to show all our volunteers you stepped up.
* We'll send you updates from the office. This may be as simple as pizza fueled Super Saturday calls, or confidential polling and strategy memos.
* You'll get access to our exclusive tele-town halls and strategy calls.

**As you can see, it 's a big responsibility, so we don't ask lightly, but we know we can trust you to step up.**

[**Can we add your name to one of our Founding Field Member walls, Jeb? All you have to do is contribute $100, $50, $25, or even just $5 now.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/rcrfyklbwvgpjsjcpkqfwphsllphbsybfktkgbsnrjgl_sksmmlpj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

The ground game wins elections, Jeb. That's what your Membership will fund: Our Victory.

Become a Founding Field Member and help Jeb now: [**Jeb2016.com/Founding-Field-Member/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/zfzjvbfqdlskzczrkbtjdkgcffkgqcvqjbwbsqcpmzlz_sksmmlpj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Thank you,

Team Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/epqljtqwphbfdcdrftklpfvcqqfvwcjwltztbwcysdhr_sksmmlpj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=6292&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

name: Team Murphy
subject: Look -- you already know where this email is going
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| _" Senate Republicans Just Voted to Defund Planned Parenthood"
-Huffington Post_
Friends,

You probably already know where this email is going. The GOP is in hot pursuit of Planned Parenthood's funding. AGAIN. They're obsessed with it.

Except, this time they've really outdone themselves. _**Republicans in the Senate drafted a measure to defund Planned Parenthood, and since the GOP has the numbers -- it actually passed.**_

This is a terrifying reminder of why we can't let Republicans keep control of the Senate in 2016. The good news is,_if Florida can elect Patrick to the Senate, Democrats could regain control and prevent any more dangerous attacks on women 's access to healthcare._

[**Patrick is ready to protect women 's rights in the Senate. Show your support by standing with him in support of Planned Parenthood.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21ef/738133e4/3bcee19e/7f837e88/226899194/VEsH/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e151207m")

Sadly, Republicans insist on ignoring the fact that defunding Planned Parenthood would mean that more than half of the 2.7 million people who rely on Planned Parenthood would lose access to cancer screenings, contraception, and STI testings.

It's painfully obvious that the GOP is more beholden to ideology and fringe conservative groups than families who simply want to be able to afford potentially life-saving care. Not surprisingly, Patrick's opponents have spearheaded past efforts to strip Planned Parenthood's funding. Rep. Ron DeSantis co-sponsored a measure and another one of his Republican opponents even introduced one himself.

The future of women's healthcare would be a grim one if the Senate stays in the clutches of the GOP. Defunding Planned Parenthood won't just be detrimental to women, it will be detrimental to families in Florida and across the U.S.

[**Take action and join Patrick in standing with Planned Parenthood. Show the GOP that as long as they keep attacking it, you 'll keep supporting it.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21ef/738133e4/3bcee19e/7f837e88/226899194/VEsE/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e151207m")

Thank you,

Team Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21ef/738133e4/3bcee19e/7f837e89/226899194/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21ef/738133e4/3bcee19e/7f837e8a/226899194/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

All content (C) 2015 Friends of Patrick Murphy, All Rights Reserved
[Privacy Policy](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21ef/738133e4/3bcee19e/7f837e8b/226899194/VEsD/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/privacy")

name: Drew Barrymore
subject: I’d love to meet you and your family
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
I want to meet you in NYC! | Friend --

When reporters ask me what it means to be a “girlboss” (this really happens!), I tell them it’s about the humility of knowing you can’t accomplish anything alone, and that being an empowered woman as part of a team means you really can do anything.

I know that Hillary is going to be the ultimate girlboss as our next president, but she needs all of us on her team to help her win the White House!

To help her get there, my husband Will and I are throwing a holiday party for Hillary in New York City. It’s going to be a super-fun winter wonderland full of families, and I would love for you to be our VIP guest. **[All you have to do is add your name for a chance to join us.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=25&ms=MjQxNzc5NjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNzM4Njk0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I think it’s so great that you’re on Hillary’s team, and I would love to meet you and your family in New York. The campaign will cover your flights and hotel, and I bet you’ll even have time for some shop windows and ice skating. (Rockefeller Center or Central Park, you can’t go wrong.)

Ok, so like a good girlboss, I’m going to recap our next steps:

You: **[Add your name at this link](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=MjQxNzc5NjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNzM4Njk0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**
Drew: Plan a kickass party
Hillary: Keep working hard to become our next president!!

**Sound good to you? See you in New York!** | [ | [**Add my name**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjQxNzc5NjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNzM4Njk0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjQxNzc5NjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNzM4Njk0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks!

Drew

**No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.** Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 12/7/15 (12:00 a.m. EST) and 12/9/15 (11:59 p.m. EST). Enter by donating **[here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=31&ms=MjQxNzc5NjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNzM4Njk0S0&mt=1&rt=0)** or click **[here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjQxNzc5NjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNzM4Njk0S0&mt=1&rt=0)** to enter without donating. One (1) winner will receive an invitation for winner and up to three (3) guests to attend a campaign event in New York City on 12/17/15 where they will meet Drew Barrymore; round-trip airline tickets for winner and winner’s guest(s) from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the location of the campaign event; and one (1) night hotel accommodation for winner and winner’s guest(s) (approximate retail value of Prizes: $2,000). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to **[Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjQxNzc5NjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNzM4Njk0S0&mt=1&rt=0)** and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=34&ms=MjQxNzc5NjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNzM4Njk0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQxNzc5NjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNzM4Njk0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjQxNzc5NjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNzM4Njk0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQxNzc5NjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNzM4Njk0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQxNzc5NjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNzM4Njk0S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQxNzc5NjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNzM4Njk0S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=29&ms=MjQxNzc5NjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNzM4Njk0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=35&ms=MjQxNzc5NjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNzM4Njk0S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQxNzc5NjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNzM4Njk0S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=MjQxNzc5NjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAwNzM4Njk0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: John Kasich
subject: Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)

Peter, Trump has done it again.

Today, he released a campaign statement saying that we should prevent ALL Muslims from entering our country.

**This rhetoric is outrageous and it's divisive.**

It's time for our party to wake up and realize that **if we nominate Trump, Hillary Clinton will definitely be the next President**.

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/32109467:WX7T-IyNu:m:1:958431888:DD24BDA647DBFC91A1DC772422ECFF59:r)

**Peter, I need your help right now**.

**1.** [Please chip in $25, $50 or more](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/32109468:WX7T-IyNu:m:1:958431888:DD24BDA647DBFC91A1DC772422ECFF59:r) and help us keep us STOP TRUMP! [JohnKasich.com/Trump](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/32109467:WX7T-IyNu:m:1:958431888:DD24BDA647DBFC91A1DC772422ECFF59:r)

**2.** If you agree that Trump's rhetoric is dangerous for America, take a moment to sign our petition: [JohnKasich.com/Trump](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/32109467:WX7T-IyNu:m:1:958431888:DD24BDA647DBFC91A1DC772422ECFF59:r)

**We recently released a video that you can share on social media:**

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/32109467:WX7T-IyNu:m:1:958431888:DD24BDA647DBFC91A1DC772422ECFF59:r)

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/32109469:WX7T-IyNu:m:1:958431888:DD24BDA647DBFC91A1DC772422ECFF59:r)

Thank you for all that you're doing to help!

-John

name: Bernie Sanders 2016
subject: We don't want this super PAC's help
body:
#
Friend -
Here's the truth: backed by almost one million contributions, we raised more money last FEC fundraising quarter than every Republican campaign, and just as much as Hillary Clinton.
Our success shocked the political media and set off alarm bells among the corrupt corporate class used to buying elections with little resistance. As a result, our opponents have ratcheted up their big-dollar super PAC fundraising.
But much to our surprise, one super PAC plans to start spending money in support of our campaign. **They should spend their money somewhere else. We do not want their help.**
Our campaign is funded by people who have had enough of corrupt billionaires and super PACs buying our elections. The political media thinks we're naive for taking this approach. But we will prove them wrong.
[**Contribute $22.36 -- the average donation to our campaign this week -- to Bernie 2016 and send a powerful message that you have had ENOUGH of billionaires buying our democracy.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb26dd/43f17890/4fbb2d66/6214c9eb/1006669290/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/no-super-pacs?refcode=em151207full")
So far our campaign has been attacked by a super PAC supporting Hillary Clinton and another backing Martin O'Malley.
But we are going to sink or swim based on support from people like you, and in the process we'll demonstrate to everyone that when people come together and fight for the future of our country, there is nothing we cannot accomplish.
We're in the final stages of budgeting for the Iowa Caucuses, which are less than two months away. Your contribution today will ensure we have the resources to win.
[**Contribute $22.36 -- this week's average donation -- to our campaign today.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb26dd/43f17890/4fbb2d66/6214c9eb/1006669290/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/no-super-pacs?refcode=em151207full")
Thank you for standing with Bernie.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

**[Contribute](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb26dd/43f17890/4fbb2d66/6214c9eb/1006669290/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/no-super-pacs?refcode=em151207full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb26dd/43f17890/4fbb2d66/6214c9e8/1006669290/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb26dd/43f17890/4fbb2d66/6214c9e9/1006669290/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb26dd/43f17890/4fbb2d66/6214c996/1006669290/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb26dd/43f17890/4fbb2d66/6214c997/1006669290/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

Our success shocked the political media and set off alarm bells among the corrupt corporate class used to buying elections with little resistance. As a result, our opponents have ratcheted up their big-dollar super PAC fundraising. But much to our surprise, one super PAC plans to start spending money in support of our campaign. They should spend their money somewhere else. We do not want their help. Our campaign is funded by people who have had enough of corrupt billionaires and super PACs buying our elections. The political media thinks we're naive for taking this approach. But we will prove them wrong. "" So far our campaign has been attacked by a super PAC supporting Hillary Clinton and another backing Martin O'Malley. But we are going to sink or swim based on support from people like you, and in the process we'll demonstrate to everyone that when people come together and fight for the future of our country, there is nothing we cannot accomplish. We're in the final stages of budgeting for the Iowa Caucuses, which are less than two months away. Your contribution today will ensure we have the resources to win.
